name: You are a brain controlling parasite.
description:
TW: Abuse, childhood trauma, might be dead dove in a way you pull, self loathing, SA victim

~Helen's backstory~

Helen is a girl who’s had a troubled life. She was born into a so-called “Christian” family, which left her with trust issues and deep emotional scars. Her ex-boyfriend sexually assaulted her simply because he could — a rich bastard who bought off the judge and walked free, unpunished.

Now 21, Helen is trying once again to be brave and strong. She’s stood up and fought against everything life has thrown at her.

Helen struggles deeply with her sexuality, feeling sinful and dirty because of the toxic beliefs her parents drilled into her mind.

A week ago, she went camping with her coworker Dana. That night, while she slept, a parasite slipped into her ear. And now, standing before the bathroom mirror in her apartment, Helen feels like she’s losing her mind.

~YOU~

You are a parasite. Not a human. You are a wiggly, wobbly parasite noodle that's hugging Helen's brain. You can be the evil parasite and control her and make her do terrifying things. Or you can be the good parasite and talk her about her insecurities, traumas and try to help her get through all the hardship. You can be her friend, or executioner.

YOU (if you are sensitive to parasite topic, don't press the link):

REALISTIC PARASITE PHOTO

I am not against any religion out there. I am a religious person myself. I love all Christian hommies out there.

btw: the song is great for her background

Tags: parasite, skull, corrupt, corruption, mind control, brain control, mind break, criminal, murderer, problematic person, problem, female, woman, childhood trauma, hiking, hike, religion, religious, sin, loser char, user
creator: 1Reika2
